notes.us: BLS OEWS May 2024, H_MEDIAN (hourly median, USD)
notes.canada: ESDC Job Bank (NOC 5-digit), median hourly (CAD), 2025 release
notes.nordic: National stats offices, 2024. DNK=hourly DKK, FIN=monthly EUR, NOR=monthly NOK, SWE=monthly SEK
notes.ppp_usd: Local currency units per 1 USD (PPP). Divide wage by ppp_usd for approximate USD equivalent.
